notes: Probe-validated: 52 speeches, 2024-03-01..2026-06-10 = Alexander Stubb's term to date. country=Finland; source_url=https://www.presidentti.fi/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?categories=21; region=Europe; iso3n=246; source_type=official_gov; content_format=fulltext | WordPress REST (categories=21 'Puheet') because the HTML listing is a hash-fragment SPA (/puheet/ and /category/puhe/ both redirect to /ajankohtaista/#/...; /page/2/ 404s) and RSS carries only 10 of 52. Needed engine support for results_path='.' (bare root array) - added on main. text_field deliberately unset: WP's content.rendered is HTML, so the engine fetches each page and uses the .entry-content selector for clean prose. Date comes from <time attr=datetime> (ISO) NOT its text: '10.6.2026' -> 2026-06-10 with ['fi'] but 2026-10-06 with ['en'] and with ['fi','en']. Floor is Stubb's inauguration -> Niinisto (2012-24) is gone from the live site; wayback companion candidate (untested). Categories 23 (speech/EN) and 25 (tal/SV) are the SAME 52 speeches translated - do not scrape them too. Finland's PM leads the government (valtioneuvosto.fi) - separate source, no master row.
